Shared_Mailbox_New_Email.description: Triggers when a new SA1300 workbook lands in the 4171 Calgary shared mailbox.

Filter_SA1300_Attachments.description: Filter attachments to only get the SA1300.xlsx file, skipping signature images and other attachments.

Create_Budget_Table.description: Create a dedicated Current Month-To-Date Sales table for the SA1300 attachment.

Get_Budget_Tables.description: Fetch table IDs for the SA1300 worksheet.

List_Budget_Rows.description: List budget rows from the table created for Current Month-To-Date Sales.

Filter_Budget_Rows.description: Keep only populated Current Month-To-Date Sales rows.

Create_Budget_Target_Table.description: Create a dedicated Month-End Plan table for the SA1300 attachment.

List_Budget_Target_Rows.description: List Month-End Plan rows from the table created for the SA1300 attachment.

Filter_Budget_Target_Rows.description: Keep only populated Month-End Plan rows.

Resolve_Budget_Goal_From_SA1300_Plan.description: Resolve the SA1300 Month-End Plan target from the Location Summary sheet.

Guard_Budget_Row_Limit.description: Stop if the row limit is reached (possible truncation).

parameters.$filter: qfu_branchcode eq '@{parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode')}' and qfu_month eq @{int(formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'MM'))} and qfu_fiscalyear eq '@{parameters('qfu_QFU_ActiveFiscalYear')}'
qfu_isactive eq false and qfu_branchcode eq '@{parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode')}' and qfu_sourcefamily eq 'SA1300'

qfu_branchcode eq '@{parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode')}' and qfu_month eq @{outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_month']} and qfu_fiscalyear eq '@{outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_fiscalyear']}'

item.qfu_cadsales: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_cadsales'], variables('CADSales'))
item.qfu_usdsales: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_usdsales'], variables('USDSales'))
item.qfu_lastupdated: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_lastupdated'], utcNow())
item.qfu_actualsales: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], variables('TotalSales'))
item.qfu_budgetname: @concat(formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'MMMM'), ' ', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy'), ' Budget')
item.qfu_opsdailycadjson: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_opsdailycadjson'], string(json('[]'))), string(coalesce(body('Filter_CAD_Ops_Daily_Rows'), json('[]'))))
item.qfu_opsdailyusdjson: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_opsdailyusdjson'], string(json('[]'))), string(coalesce(outputs('Filter_USD_Ops_Daily_Rows')?['body'], json('[]'))))

item.qfu_budgetname: @concat(formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'MMMM'), ' ', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy'), ' Budget')

Compose_Budget_Row_Limit_Skip.description: Skip budget import when row count hits the max table range.
Compose_Budget_Row_Limit_Skip.inputs: Budget import stopped: row count hit the 500-row limit. Skipping updates.

Create_Abnormal_Margin_Table.description: Create a temporary Excel table over the Abnormal Margin Review sheet.

List_Abnormal_Margin_Rows.description: Read abnormal margin rows from the temporary Excel table.

Filter_Abnormal_Margin_Rows.description: Keep only abnormal margin rows for the current branch with a billing document and review type.

inputs.where: @and(not(empty(item()?['Billing Document Number'])), equals(string(item()?['Location']), parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode')), not(empty(item()?['Reveiw Type'])))

List_Existing_Abnormal_Margin_Snapshot.description: Load existing same-branch abnormal margin rows so today's snapshot can be replaced deterministically.

Filter_Existing_Abnormal_Margin_Snapshot.description: Keep only abnormal margin rows for this branch and today's snapshot date.

Delete_Existing_Abnormal_Margin_Snapshot.description: Delete today's abnormal margin rows before reloading the latest workbook snapshot.

Apply_to_each_Abnormal_Margin_Row.description: Create abnormal margin snapshot rows for the current branch from the SA1300 workbook.

parameters.item/qfu_billingdate: @if(empty(items('Apply_to_each_Abnormal_Margin_Row')?['Billing Date']), null, if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_Abnormal_Margin_Row')?['Billing Date']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_Abnormal_Margin_Row')?['Billing Date']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_Abnormal_Margin_Row')?['Billing Date'], 'yyyy-MM-dd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_Abnormal_Margin_Row')?['Billing Date']))), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))

List_Existing_Abnormal_Margin_Batches.description: Load existing abnormal margin batch audit rows for today's snapshot.

Filter_Existing_Abnormal_Margin_Batches.description: Keep only today's abnormal margin snapshot batch rows.

Delete_Existing_Abnormal_Margin_Batches.description: Delete today's abnormal margin batch audit rows before creating the replacement audit row.

Create_Abnormal_Margin_Batch.description: Create the abnormal margin ingestion audit row for today's SA1300 snapshot.

parameters.item/qfu_notes: Parsed from the SA1300 abnormal margin review sheet.

Create_USD_Ops_Daily_Table.description: Create a temporary Excel table over the USD Daily Sales- Location block.

List_USD_Ops_Daily_Rows.description: Read USD Daily Sales- Location rows from the temporary Excel table.

Filter_USD_Ops_Daily_Rows.description: Keep only USD Daily Sales- Location rows for the current branch or total row.

inputs.where: @and(not(empty(item()?['Billing Day'])), not(empty(item()?['On-Time Delivery'])), or(equals(string(item()?['Location']), parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode')), equals(string(item()?['Billing Day']), 'Total')))

Create_CAD_Ops_Daily_Table.description: Create a temporary Excel table over the configured CAD Daily Sales- Location block.

List_CAD_Ops_Daily_Rows.description: Read CAD Daily Sales- Location rows from the temporary Excel table.

Filter_CAD_Ops_Daily_Rows.description: Keep only CAD Daily Sales- Location rows for the current branch or total row.

inputs.where: @and(not(empty(item()?['Billing Day'])), not(empty(item()?['On-Time Delivery'])), or(equals(string(item()?['Location']), parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode')), equals(string(item()?['Billing Day']), 'Total')))

List_Existing_Branch_Ops_Daily.description: Get existing branch ops daily rows so the latest SA1300 snapshot replaces them.

Delete_Existing_Branch_Ops_Daily.description: Delete prior branch ops daily rows before loading the latest SA1300 snapshot.
Delete_Existing_Branch_Ops_Daily.foreach: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), json('[]'), coalesce(outputs('List_Existing_Branch_Ops_Daily')?['body/value'], json('[]')))

Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row.description: Create USD branch ops daily rows from the SA1300 workbook.
Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row.foreach: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), json('[]'), coalesce(body('Filter_USD_Ops_Daily_Rows'), json('[]')))

parameters.item/qfu_name: @concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), ' Ops Daily USD ', if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), 'Total', if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'yyyy-MM-dd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'yyyy-MM-dd'))))
parameters.item/qfu_sourceid: @concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300-OPSDAILY|', variables('SA1300SnapshotDate'), '|USD|', if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), 'total', if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'yyyyMMdd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'yyyyMMdd'))))
parameters.item/qfu_billingday: @if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), null, if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'yyyy-MM-dd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))
parameters.item/qfu_billinglabel: @if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), 'Total', if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'yyyy-MM-dd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))
parameters.item/qfu_sortorder: @if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), 999, if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), int(formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'dd')), int(formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_USD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'dd'))))

Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row.description: Create CAD branch ops daily rows from the SA1300 workbook.
Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row.foreach: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), json('[]'), coalesce(body('Filter_CAD_Ops_Daily_Rows'), json('[]')))

parameters.item/qfu_name: @concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), ' Ops Daily CAD ', if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), 'Total', if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'yyyy-MM-dd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'yyyy-MM-dd'))))
parameters.item/qfu_sourceid: @concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300-OPSDAILY|', variables('SA1300SnapshotDate'), '|CAD|', if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), 'total', if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'yyyyMMdd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'yyyyMMdd'))))
parameters.item/qfu_billingday: @if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), null, if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'yyyy-MM-dd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))
parameters.item/qfu_billinglabel: @if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), 'Total', if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'yyyy-MM-dd'), formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))
parameters.item/qfu_sortorder: @if(equals(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), 'Total'), 999, if(or(contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '-'), contains(string(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']), '/')), int(formatDateTime(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day'], 'dd')), int(formatDateTime(addDays('1899-12-30', int(float(items('Apply_to_each_CAD_Ops_Daily_Row')?['Billing Day']))), 'dd'))))

Get_Current_Month_Budget_Record_For_Anal.description: Get the current month qfu_budget row so analytics can store the latest SA1300 daily payload.

parameters.$filter: qfu_branchcode eq '@{parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode')}' and qfu_sourcefamily eq 'SA1300' and qfu_sourceid eq '@{concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))}' and qfu_fiscalyear eq '@{parameters('qfu_QFU_ActiveFiscalYear')}'

Update_Current_Month_Budget_Analytics_Pa.description: Store the latest SA1300 daily ops payload on the current qfu_budget row for analytics.

item.qfu_opsdailycadjson: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_opsdailycadjson'], string(json('[]'))), string(coalesce(body('Filter_CAD_Ops_Daily_Rows'), json('[]'))))
item.qfu_opsdailyusdjson: @if(and(equals(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_sourceid'], concat(parameters('qfu_QFU_BranchCode'), '|SA1300|', formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Mountain Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM'))), greater(float(coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_actualsales'], 0)), float(coalesce(variables('TotalSales'), 0)))), coalesce(outputs('Get_Active_Budget')?['body/value']?[0]?['qfu_opsdailyusdjson'], string(json('[]'))), string(coalesce(outputs('Filter_USD_Ops_Daily_Rows')?['body'], json('[]'))))

runError.message: No budget target was found from qfu_budgetarchive or the SA1300 Month-End Plan.
